ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Request For Default Prove Up And Court Judgment Against Defendant Marina Romero
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Marina Romero.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

John P. Strouss, III, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Dinora Garcia, who was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Garcia appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Marina Romero.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Personal Injury was filed on June 29, 2017, and personally served on defendant Marina Romero.
Plaintiff's Statement of Damages was personally served on defendant Marina Romero on January 9, 2020, and filed with the Clerk's Office on January 30, 2020.
Default as to defendant Marina Romero was entered on January 30, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 3, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Dinora Garcia, and against the defaulted defendant Marina Romero, as follows:

General Damages - $35,000.00.
Special Damages - $3,947.10.
Costs - $2,537.27.

Total - $41,484.37.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
